summary: Data Source Tracing Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 16 backend tests PASSED. All frontend verification PASSED. The AI Program Brief now correctly shows data that matches the Director's Mission Control dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend mission_control.py: attention[:8] correctly limits Needs Attention to 8 items
Backend intelligence.py: daily_briefing correctly filters to future events only (daysAway >= 0)
Backend decision_engine.py: detect_deadline_proximity skips past events (daysAway < 0)
Backend services/ai.py: prompt correctly instructs AI to only reference provided data
Frontend AIProgramBrief.js: correctly shows data basis footer with alerts_count and events_count
All TEST_REFACTOR text has been cleaned from the system
seed_data_creation: None - used existing clean seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data source tracing bug fix verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/mission-control returns programStatus with KPIs, needsAttention (8 items), upcomingEvents (5 future only), coachHealth, recruitingSignals. POST /api/ai/briefing generates AI text based on same data (alerts_count=12, events_count=5). All data now has REAL athlete names from seed data - no TEST_REFACTOR. SoCal Showcase correctly filtered as past event (daysAway: -1). Events shown: Elite Academy Tournament (1 day), College Exposure Camp (3 days), Spring Classic (6 days), ID Camp (9 days), National Showcase (12 days).
